subparts.text: Discuss St. Andrea Mantua by Renaissance architect Leon Batista Alberti. CO 2
Explain the concept of "Chár-Bagh" with the help of Humayun's tomb CO 2
Explain the characteristics of renaissance architecture with Villa Rotunda and St. Peters as examples. CO 2
Salient features of the richness of the art and architecture of Vijaynagar dynasty with the help of an important example.
The cave temples of Badami CO

questions.question_text: What are the two phases of Buddhism? Mention their differences. Explain the major architectural features of Buddhism. CO 1
Draw and label all the significant parts of the great Stupa at Sanchi CO 2
Explain the architecture of the Kandaríya Mahadev temple, of Khajuraho. CO 2
Highlight all the characteristics features of the Pallavas architecture. Describe in detail the Rathas of Mahabalipuram. Draw neat sketches. CO 2
Elaborate on the emergence of Islamic Architecture in 11" century in India. Give the general characteristics of the Indian Islamic style, taking example of the Qutub Minar at Delhi. CO 1
Discuss the principles of planning used in Fatehpur Sikri. Explain any one structure in detail with neat sketches. CO 2

Briefly describe the characteristic features observed in Gothic style with suitable examples. Draw neat sketches of a plan, elevation and section of Notre Dame, Paris describing all its aesthetic elements. CO 2
Discuss the structural system in the process of building Hagia Sophia. Draw neat sketches. CO 1
